blockers.description: BFS traversal returns nodeCount=0 — loadDoc fails to find PersonMaster documents even though cache has them
blockers.workaround: Check loadDoc getItems vs cache queryTable API differences

blockers.description: Cache only loads 100 nodes (not 679+) — exclusive_start_key format may be wrong
blockers.workaround: Check NoSQLMarshall.makeString vs NoSQLItem.from format mismatch

blockers.description: 0 edges generated — possibly missing co-accused data, or edge generation code silently fails
blockers.workaround: Check Catalyst logs for edge error; verify data has co-accused via ZCQL

human_actions_pending.action: Re-add QUICKML_TOKEN in Catalyst Console → pipeline, nl_sql, rag, classifier

decisions.decision: Bundle cross-function deps into lib/ subdirectory instead of sharing via relative requires
decisions.rationale: Catalyst bundles each function independently — sibling directories not available at runtime

decisions.decision: Copy entity-matching-engine files rather than symlink
decisions.rationale: Catalyst zip deployment doesn't support symlinks

decisions.decision: Index source_records by both row_id and source_id
decisions.rationale: PersonMaster docs use source_id field but _getSourceRecordIndex only checked row_id

decisions.decision: Use getItems instead of fetchItem for loadDoc
decisions.rationale: fetchItem response format may differ from what Catalyst returns

next_action: Debug BFS traversal: verify loadDoc API returns PersonMaster documents. Run /cache-info?dump=true to check cache state, then trace _getTraversalResult resolution chain. If loadDoc fails, try different NoSQL SDK API (getItems vs fetchItem vs queryTable).
context_notes: Phase 2 work on branch phase2-dashboard (not pushed to origin). Heavily focused on fixing cross-function dependency bundling and runtime errors for the entity resolution + graph visualization subsystem. Core conversational AI functions (pipeline, classifier, nl_sql, rag, session, query_exec, test) work fine. Dashboard functions (7 endpoints) and graph-service-api (health, validation) work. Remaining issues: PersonMaster NoSQL caching only loads 100 nodes (pagination key format), BFS traversal loadDoc API not returning documents (returns nodeCount=0), and edge generation produced 0 edges (may be data-limited).
